title: エリザベス女王杯の後に・誕生、そして

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober has won. She and Air Groove praise
each other on a job well done and vow to battle
again on an even grander stage one day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, Mejiro Dober proudly declares to the
crowd that she is the harbinger of a new Mejiro
era.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone celebrates the light Mejiro Dober and
Mejiro Bright now shine as symbolic of the new
Mejiro legacy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, their era has only just begun. The
luminous paths Mejiro Dober and Mejiro Bright
walk are far from having reached their ends.
